name: w2-semantic-search
title: W2 semantic search upgrade: Discord embedding + vector-first search (commits & Discord) + embedding backfill
description: Upgrade all agent retrieval from keyword to vector-first with keyword fallback. W2a: implement the embedding step in onDiscordMessageCreated (copy onCommitCreated pattern). W2b: searchDiscordMessages vector-first (findNearest/COSINE) with keyword+recency fallback, return shape unchanged. W2c: unify searchPastCommits to vector-first, keyword fallback. W2d: one-off backfillEmbeddings({repoId, collection}) callable, idempotent, batched.
creator: gitsync
notes: Implemented W2a–W2d per prd + Fable 5 rulings (Q1–Q5 resolved in prd.md). Gates green: typecheck 0 errors, jest 32 suites / 236 tests (was 29/211), lint 0 errors. No index/dep/deploy changes. Orchestrator to close.
